candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not total.

candidates.row_label: Current assets held for sale and in discontinued operations
candidates.why: Specific current asset subset, not total current assets.
Balancing/component line, not the total current assets figure.
Non-current assets total, wrong target.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash flow ending balance for CHE.
Cash only, excludes equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and equivalents, end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance matches conceptually, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.
Restricted cash should generally be excluded from cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and equivalents, beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, wrong period endpoint for balance-sheet CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet label directly matches cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not total.

candidates.row_label: Current liabilities held for sale and in discontinued operations
candidates.why: Subset of current liabilities, not total.
Balancing/component line, not total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities total, wrong target.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-term debt and current maturities of long-term debt
candidates.why: Clean total for short-term debt/current portion of LT debt; preferred because it already aggregates the relevant financing-related current debt and avoids double counting.

candidates.row_label: Current maturities of Long Term Debt
candidates.why: Valid component of STD, but should not be combined with the clean total line.
Valid component of STD, but should not be combined with the clean total line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt due within 1 year
candidates.why: Alternative component/current portion line, but less consistently populated and redundant if the clean total is used.

final_choice.row_label: Short-term debt and current maturities of long-term debt

variables.notes: Selected the clean aggregate debt current line. Excludes lease rows per rule.

candidates.row_label: Income taxes payable and other income tax related liabilities
candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet current income tax payable/liability line; best match for taxes payable.
Cash flow working-capital adjustment, not the balance-sheet payable stock.

final_choice.row_label: Income taxes payable and other income tax related liabilities

variables.notes: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match for net PPE on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not PPE stock.

candidates.why: Cash flow line, not PPE stock.
Intangible assets, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Purchases of property, plant and equipment and intangible assets
candidates.why: Capex flow, not PPE stock.
Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Other Long Term Assets - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Only a component of non-current assets, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash provided by operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Net cash provided by operating activities - discontinued operations
candidates.why: Only discontinued operations component, not total OANCF.

candidates.why: Adjustment line, not operating cash flow total.
